authority.name: HornResp bounded fixed-real-topology baseline parity smoke fixture v1
authority.source_reference: operator-bounded HornResp baseline parity surface for the fixed v0.8.0 real-topology adapter example
authority.scope: smoke-grade parity only; not an external accuracy certification or broad HornResp benchmark

non_claims: This fixture is a bounded HornResp parity smoke authority, not a tight acoustic accuracy target.
The smoke-grade thresholds are bounded and must not be loosened to force a green gate.
A failed gate is a valid outcome when solver output is not close enough to the HornResp fixture.
This fixture does not establish full external reference agreement.
This fixture does not authorize optimizer integration, broad import, arbitrary topology mutation, or platform growth.
